value.found_quote: Use Codex code review to get another high-signal review pass on GitHub pull requests. Codex reviews the pull request diff, follows your repository guidance, and posts a standard GitHub code review focused on serious issues. ... If you mention `@codex` in a comment with anything other than `review`, Codex starts a [cloud task](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cloud) using your pull request as context.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Codex's GitHub integration, including: (1) reviewing pull request diffs and posting code reviews on GitHub, (2) being triggered by mentioning @codex review in a PR comment, and (3) starting async cloud tasks when @codex is mentioned with any other instruction (e.g., "@codex fix the CI failures"). This directly substantiates all elements of the claim — GitHub PR review integration, @codex mentions as trigger, and async cloud task delegation. The page presents this as a current, active feature with setup instructions and settings pages.
